relationships.to: Treat Hard Task Like Easy Topic
relationships.context: This specific analogy is an instance of the broader rhetorical pattern
The primitive reframes self-advocacy as low-stakes and natural
Designed to lower the emotional barrier to self-promotion
Applicable in career coaching and professional development contexts
Operates by shifting internal framing from high-stakes to familiar
Supports growth by making self-advocacy feel accessible
Originally sourced or published on LinkedIn
Cataloged as a high-distinctiveness (0.90) voice primitive in V's system
LinkedIn serves as a source platform for harvesting voice primitives
